description_long: This is a plush representation of Mickey Mouse, featuring a large round head with prominent black circular ears and a beige face. The toy has expressive oval eyes, a small black nose, and a smiling mouth. Its body is dressed in a red pair of shorts with two white buttons, yellow shoes, and white gloves on its hands. The arms are outstretched to the sides, and the legs are slightly apart, giving it a welcoming and playful stance. The surface appears soft and matte, typical of stuffed toys, with visible stitching lines on the clothing and shoes. The overall design is iconic and instantly recognizable as the classic Disney character.
description: A soft, plush Mickey Mouse toy with outstretched arms, red shorts, yellow shoes, and white gloves. The toy features a friendly face and classic cartoon proportions.
description_view_0: Front view showing Mickey Mouse's face, red shorts with white buttons, yellow shoes, and outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, protruding nose, and the thickness of the arms and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, ears, red shorts, and yellow shoes, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile of the face, nose, and the side of the body and limbs.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is cheerful and friendly, with wide open eyes, a small black nose, and a slight smile. The eyebrows are neutral, contributing to a welcoming appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms outstretched to the sides and legs slightly apart.
